text: Queensland POLLUTION OF WATERS BY OIL AMENDMENT BILL 1992 Queensland POLLUTION OF WATERS BY OIL AMENDMENT BILL 1992 Section 2 Short title .. Amended Act TABLE OF PROVISIONS Page SR 4 Sa 4 SCHEDULE 1 ........................ 5 INCREASED PENALTIES SCHEDULE 2 .....................4.. 9 MINOR AMENDMENTS A BILL FOR An Act to amend the Pollution of Waters by Oil Act 1973 Pollution of Waters by Oil Amendment BE IT ENACTED by the Queen's Most Excellent Majesty, by and with the advice and consent of the Legislative Assembly of Queensland in Parliament assembled, and by the authority of the same, as follows. Short title Clause1.
citation: Pollution of Waters by Oil Amendment Bill 1992 (Qld)

text: This Act may be cited as the Pollution of Waters by Oil Amendment Act 1992. Amended Act Clause2. The Pollution of Waters by Oil Act 1973 is amended as set out in this Act.
citation: Pollution of Waters by Oil Amendment Bill 1992 (Qld)
